name: hydra
description: Hydra desktop shell built with Electron

scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:assets
scripts.build:assets: mkdir -p dist-electron/main dist-electron/renderer/vendor && cp electron/main/pty_host.py dist-electron/main/pty_host.py && cp electron/main/app-launch-runner.sh dist-electron/main/app-launch-runner.sh && chmod +x dist-electron/main/app-launch-runner.sh && cp electron/renderer/index.html dist-electron/renderer/index.html && cp electron/renderer/app.css dist-electron/renderer/app.css && cp electron/renderer/vendor/xterm.css dist-electron/renderer/vendor/xterm.css && cp electron/renderer/vendor/xterm.js dist-electron/renderer/vendor/xterm.js && cp electron/renderer/vendor/addon-fit.js dist-electron/renderer/vendor/addon-fit.js
scripts.pack: npm run build && npm run build:icon && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --dir
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run build:icon && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build && npm run build:icon && node scripts/run-electron-builder.mjs --mac
